title: Flower Seeds 2 Biomes O Plenty
description: Flower Seeds 2 support for Biomes O Plenty
body:
# Flower Seeds 2 - Biomes O Plenty  


Biomes O Plenty support for Flower Seeds 2  
 

Adding:

*   Flower crops
*   Villager Trades for seeds
*   Botany Pots, Thermal Insulator, IE Cloche support
*   Flowers now reference vanilla models so any resourcepack that changes flower models should be compatible with the crops  

 
### Flowers Supported  

* * *
 
*   Rose
*   WildFlower
*   Orange Cosmos
*   Pink Daffodil
*   GlowFlower
*   Wilted Lily
*   Burning Blossom
